---
title: "EDA"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#load libraries
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#load crash data 
setwd("~/Data205/Data-205-Capstone-Paul-Hanscom/data/external")
Crash <- read.csv("CleanedCrashData.csv")
#load cleaned weather dataset
setwd("~/Data205/Data-205-Capstone-Paul-Hanscom/data/processed")
Weather <- read.csv("CleanedWeatherData.csv")
```
```{r}
#Show head structure and summary of prcp variable for the weather dataset
head(Weather)
str(Weather)
summary(Weather$totalprcp)
```
```{r}
#graph totalprcp variable and save to eda/images in github
p1 <- ggplot(Weather,aes(totalprcp))+
  geom_histogram()+
  labs(
    x = "Percipitation",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
p1
setwd("~/Data205/Data-205-Capstone-Paul-Hanscom/eda/images")
ggsave("totalprcp_histogram.png", plot = p1, width = 8, height = 6)

#now do the same but log scale total prcp to reduce the effect of outliers on graph
p2 <- ggplot(Weather,aes(log10(totalprcp)))+
  geom_histogram()+
  labs(
    x = "log10 of percipitation",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
p2
setwd("~/Data205/Data-205-Capstone-Paul-Hanscom/eda/images")
ggsave("totalprcp_histogram_logscaled.png", plot = p2, width = 8, height = 6)
```
